schemes.name: prefix
schemes.notes: Keep the first B bits of the canonical binary code.

schemes.name: suffix
schemes.notes: Keep the last B bits of the canonical binary code.

schemes.name: interleaved
schemes.notes: Keep B bits from a deterministic high-low interleaving of bit positions.

schemes.name: cluster_answer
schemes.notes: Cluster states by answer traces first, then refine within each answer block by full joint traces.

schemes.name: cluster_witness
schemes.notes: Cluster states by witness traces first, then refine within each witness block by full joint traces.

schemes.name: cluster_joint
schemes.notes: Cluster states directly by full joint answer/witness traces.

families.label: causal_referee
families.notes: Static sweep over the 89,291 unique-minimal referee narratives. The answer channel is adjustment-set size `k`; witness fidelity tracks exact named adjustment-set identity.
